title: Vidmoat — AI Video Editor. Type a prompt, get a finished video.
excerpt: Vidmoat is an AI video editor with an agent that reads your footage, cuts the dead air, writes captions, removes backgrounds, and ships shorts to every platform — from one prompt.
content_html:
VIDMOAT

REC 00:00:00:00/THE AGENT-FIRST VIDEO EDITOR

Don't edit.
Delegate.

Vidmoat is the video editor built for agents. Tell the built-in one what you want — or plug in Claude, Cursor, or your own — and it cuts, captions, grades and ships finished videos. You take the credit.

No credit card. No watermarks. No "rendering…" existential dread.

✦ cut 47 silences

✦ captions: ON

✦ b-roll matched

cooking_video_FINAL_v9(actual).mp4AI: COOKING

▶

“okay so today we're making the CRISPIEST—”

MADE FOR WHERE YOU ACTUALLY POST

Edit once. Post everywhere.

One edit gets reframed, re-timed and re-hooked for every platform. Click a format — or just watch it cycle.

REELS9:16 · auto-reframed

YOUTUBE16:9 · full cut · 11:07

SHORTS×12 · hooks included

One edit in. Sixteen posts out. Your upload schedule never saw it coming.

[F1] — THE HEADLINER

Auto-Cut watches all 3 hours of your footage so you don't have to.

It finds the good takes, kills the dead air, and stitches the story — before your coffee even brews. Every cut stays editable, because we know you'll tweak it anyway.

See it in the editor →

RAW — 03:12:443h of chaos

✂ auto-cut ran (14 sec)

CUT — 00:11:0711 min of banger

[NEW] — MOAT AI AGENT

Type what you want.
Watch it edit itself.

Never opened a video editor? Doesn't matter. Tell the agent "make this a punchy TikTok" and it reads your footage, writes the captions, cuts the dead air, and grades the color — step by step, out loud, until it's done.

✦Understands what’s said in your clips (word-level)

✦Plans multi-step edits & self-corrects

✦Never touches what you didn’t ask for

Try a prompt free →

MOAT AI — AGENT CONSOLElive

make this a punchy tiktok

[NEW] — BRING YOUR OWN AGENT

Your editor is now an MCP server.

The first video editor any AI agent can drive end-to-end. Connect Claude Code, Cursor, or your own agents over Model Context Protocol — they import footage, edit the timeline, look at the frames they made, and render finished MP4s. No browser. No clicks.

✦65+ timeline commands — captions, keyframes, effects, all of it

✦Agents see their work: frame previews come back as images

✦Same plan, same projects — an API key is all it takes

Get your MCP key →

claude — connected to vidmoat mcp

$ claude mcp add --transport http vidmoat api.vidmoat.com/api/mcp

> "cut my podcast into 3 shorts with karaoke captions, then render"

WORKS WITH EVERY AGENT THAT SPEAKS MCP

Claude Code✦Cursor✦Windsurf✦GitHub Copilot✦Cline✦Zed✦Continue✦Goose✦Warp✦Gemini CLI✦Claude Desktop✦OpenAI Agents SDK✦

Claude Code✦Cursor✦Windsurf✦GitHub Copilot✦Cline✦Zed✦Continue✦Goose✦Warp✦Gemini CLI✦Claude Desktop✦OpenAI Agents SDK✦

…and anything else with an MCP client. One key, one command to connect →

THE FULL KIT

Everything inside.

A full professional editor underneath the agent — open a chapter.

01Cut & polish

✦Auto-cut silences

✦Beat-sync markers & cut-on-grid

✦Speed ramps, reverse & freeze frames

✦Transitions, masks & blend modes

✦Color grades, LUTs & adjustment layers

✦One-click video stabilization

02Captions, text & audio

✦Word-level auto-captions

✦Karaoke & social caption styles

✦Filler-word removal from transcript

✦Auto-duck music under speech

✦Audio EQ, restore & silence trim

✦AI sticker generator & HTML titles

03The agent & automation

✦Moat AI console — edit by prompt

✦MCP server: Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor

✦Edit from Telegram & WhatsApp chat

✦Scripting — build your own edit macros

✦REST API with your own keys

04Ship everywhere

✦Auto-reframe 9:16 · 1:1 · 16:9

✦Platform presets: TikTok, Reels, Shorts, YouTube

✦4K exports, mp4 / webm / gif

✦Distribute workspace — one edit, every format

✦Desktop app: 10 GB files, zero uploads

OR JUMP STRAIGHT TO A TOOL

Fresh from the lab.
Shipping weekly.

NO PLUG-INS / NO EXPORT QUEUE

Remove BG

One click. No green screen. The background just… leaves.

WATERMARK

Cleanup Brush

Paint over anything you regret filming. Logos, strangers, exes.

KEYED ✦

Green Screen

Chroma key with spill cleanup. Pick the color, gone.

CAPTIONSTHATACTUALLYSLAP

Karaoke Captions

Every word lights up as it's spoken. Auto-synced to your audio.

The whole suite.
None of the suffering.

06 TOOLS / 00 TUTORIALS NEEDED

[F1]CUT

Auto-Cut

Finds the good takes, kills the flops. Your rough cut, already cut.

[F2]TEXT

Text-to-Edit

Delete a sentence in the transcript, it disappears from the video. Editing by backspace.

[F3]CC

AI Captions

Word-perfect, on-beat, styled to your brand. Not a court transcript.

[F4]SFX

Silence Slayer

Umms, ahhs, and dead air — detected and deleted. Ruthlessly.

[F5]CLIP

One-Click Shorts

One long video in, twelve vertical bangers out. Hooks included.

[F6]ROLL

B-Roll Brain

It scans your library and drops the right shot at the right beat. You take the nap.

MADE FOR THE WAY YOU ACTUALLY CREATE

Three creators. Three moats.

Same agent, three completely different workflows. Yours is in here somewhere.

🎙️THE PODCASTER

Records Tuesday night. By Wednesday morning: the full episode on YouTube, twelve clips for Shorts, karaoke captions on every one. She hasn’t opened a timeline in months.

3 hrs recording13 posts

🍳THE CHEF

Films the whole cook on one phone, dumps the footage, types “fast recipe edit, keep the flip.” The agent cuts the prep, keeps the fire, captions the seasoning rant.

40 min footage60-sec banger

🏋️THE COACH

Green-screens himself over client transformations, brushes out the gym’s logo, ships a polished breakdown to four platforms — before his next session walks in.

1 take4 platforms

HOW IT WORKS — 3 STEPS, 0 BRAIN CELLS

01

Dump your footage

Drag in everything. The good takes, the bloopers, the 40 minutes you forgot to stop recording.

02

Tell it the vibe

"Fast-paced cooking video, punchy captions, keep the part where the pan catches fire." Done.

03

Ship the banger

Tweak what you want, export in every format, and get back to the part you actually love: filming.

Cheaper than an editor.
Faster than three of them.

HOBBY

$0forever

For testing the waters. Or the moat.

✦3 projects

✦Auto-Cut + captions

✦720p exports

✦Tiny watermark (sorry)

Start free

MOST HYPECREATOR

$19/month

For people who post like it’s their job. Because it is.

✦Unlimited projects

✦The full AI suite

✦4K exports, no watermark

✦One-Click Shorts

✦Brand kit + caption styles

Go Creator

STUDIO

$49/month

For teams shipping content at industrial scale.

✦Everything in Creator

✦5 seats + shared library

✦Multicam sync

✦API + priority renders

Go Studio

FAQ — THE STUFF YOU'D DM US ANYWAY

Fair questions.

Do I need to know how to edit video?+

No — that's the whole point. Type what you want in plain words (“make this a punchy TikTok”, “add captions”, “cut the boring parts”) and the AI agent plans and applies the edits. Everything stays on a normal timeline, so you can tweak by hand whenever you want.

Is the free plan actually usable?+

Yes. 3 projects, the AI console, auto-captions, effects, and 720p exports — free forever, with a small watermark. Upgrade when you want 4K, no watermark, and the pro effects.

Where does my footage go? Is it private?+

Your uploads live in your account and are only used to render your videos. The clip analysis (transcripts, silence detection) runs to power your edits — we don't train on your footage or share it.

What makes this different from CapCut or Premiere?+

Those are tools you operate. Vidmoat is agent-first: an editor that operates itself — an AI with hands on the actual timeline. It cuts, captions, grades and re-formats across platforms from one prompt, everything stays fully editable, and it's the only editor external AI agents can drive too.

Can I connect my own AI — Claude, Cursor, custom agents?+

Yes. Vidmoat ships an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server: create an API key in your dashboard, add it to Claude Code or Cursor in one command, and your agent can import media, edit the timeline with 65+ commands, preview frames as images, and render MP4s — without ever opening the app.

Can I cancel anytime?+

Anytime, in one click from your account page (Stripe handles it — no email-us-to-cancel games). Your plan stays active until the end of the period you paid for.

What can the AI actually do today?+

Auto-captions with word-sync, silence cutting, multi-step edit plans from one prompt, background removal, green screen, a cleanup brush, 33+ effects, smart splits with varied transitions — and the list grows weekly.

blocks.html_en: A full professional editor underneath the agent — open a chapter.

sentences.en: OR JUMP STRAIGHT TO A TOOL

blocks.html_en: One click. No green screen. The background just… leaves.
Paint over anything you regret filming. Logos, strangers, exes.

sentences.en: Paint over anything you regret filming.
sentences.zh: 涂掉任何你后悔拍摄的东西。

blocks.html_en: Chroma key with spill cleanup. Pick the color, gone.

sentences.zh: 具有溢出清理功能的色度键。

blocks.html_en: Every word lights up as it's spoken. Auto-synced to your audio.

sentences.en: Every word lights up as it's spoken.
sentences.zh: 每个字在说出时都会亮起。

sentences.en: The whole suite.None of the suffering.
sentences.zh: 整个套房，没有任何痛苦。

blocks.html_en: Finds the good takes, kills the flops. Your rough cut, already cut.

sentences.en: Finds the good takes, kills the flops.
sentences.zh: 找到好的镜头，消除失败的镜头。

blocks.html_en: Delete a sentence in the transcript, it disappears from the video. Editing by backspace.

sentences.en: Delete a sentence in the transcript, it disappears from the video.
sentences.zh: 删除文字记录中的一句话，它就会从视频中消失。

blocks.html_en: Word-perfect, on-beat, styled to your brand. Not a court transcript.

sentences.en: Word-perfect, on-beat, styled to your brand.
sentences.zh: 字词完美、节奏明快、风格符合您的品牌。

blocks.html_en: Umms, ahhs, and dead air — detected and deleted. Ruthlessly.

sentences.en: Umms, ahhs, and dead air — detected and deleted.
sentences.zh: 嗯，啊，死气沉沉——被发现并删除。

blocks.html_en: One long video in, twelve vertical bangers out. Hooks included.

sentences.en: One long video in, twelve vertical bangers out.
sentences.zh: 输入一段长视频，输出十二段垂直的短视频。

blocks.html_en: It scans your library and drops the right shot at the right beat. You take the nap.

sentences.en: It scans your library and drops the right shot at the right beat.
sentences.zh: 它会扫描您的库并以正确的节拍发出正确的镜头。

blocks.html_en: MADE FOR THE WAY YOU ACTUALLY CREATE

sentences.en: MADE FOR THE WAY YOU ACTUALLY CREATE
sentences.zh: 专为您实际创造的方式而设计

blocks.html_en: Same agent, three completely different workflows. Yours is in here somewhere.

sentences.en: Same agent, three completely different workflows.
sentences.zh: 同一个代理，三个完全不同的工作流程。
你的就在这儿的某个地方。

blocks.html_en: Records Tuesday night. By Wednesday morning: the full episode on YouTube, twelve clips for Shorts, karaoke captions on every one. She hasn’t opened a timeline in months.

sentences.en: By Wednesday morning: the full episode on YouTube, twelve clips for Shorts, karaoke captions on every one.
sentences.zh: 周三早上：完整剧集已在 YouTube 上发布，十二个 Shorts 剪辑，每一个都配有卡拉 OK 字幕。

sentences.en: She hasn’t opened a timeline in months.
sentences.zh: 她已经好几个月没有公开时间表了。

blocks.html_en: Films the whole cook on one phone, dumps the footage, types “fast recipe edit, keep the flip.” The agent cuts the prep, keeps the fire, captions the seasoning rant.

sentences.en: Films the whole cook on one phone, dumps the footage, types “fast recipe edit, keep the flip.”
sentences.zh: 用一部手机拍摄整个厨师的过程，转储镜头，输入“快速食谱编辑，保持翻转”。

sentences.en: The agent cuts the prep, keeps the fire, captions the seasoning rant.
sentences.zh: 特工削减了准备工作，保留了火源，在调味料的咆哮中加上了标题。
40 分钟片段 60 秒精彩片段

blocks.html_en: Green-screens himself over client transformations, brushes out the gym’s logo, ships a polished breakdown to four platforms — before his next session walks in.

sentences.en: Green-screens himself over client transformations, brushes out the gym’s logo, ships a polished breakdown to four platforms — before his next session walks in.
sentences.zh: 在他的下一次会议进入之前，他会在客户的转变中对自己进行绿屏，刷掉健身房的标志，将经过精心设计的细分发送到四个平台。

blocks.html_en: Drag in everything. The good takes, the bloopers, the 40 minutes you forgot to stop recording.

sentences.en: The good takes, the bloopers, the 40 minutes you forgot to stop recording.
sentences.zh: 好的镜头、错误的镜头、你忘记停止录制的 40 分钟。

blocks.html_en: "Fast-paced cooking video, punchy captions, keep the part where the pan catches fire." Done.

sentences.en: "Fast-paced cooking video, punchy captions, keep the part where the pan catches fire."
sentences.zh: “快节奏的烹饪视频，有力的字幕，保留锅着火的部分。”

blocks.html_en: Tweak what you want, export in every format, and get back to the part you actually love: filming.

sentences.en: Tweak what you want, export in every format, and get back to the part you actually love: filming.
sentences.zh: 调整您想要的内容，以各种格式导出，然后回到您真正喜欢的部分：拍摄。

blocks.html_en:
Cheaper than an editor.
Faster than three of them.

sentences.en: Cheaper than an editor.Faster than three of them.
sentences.zh: 比一个编辑便宜。比三个编辑更快。

blocks.html_en: For testing the waters. Or the moat.
For people who post like it’s their job. Because it is.

sentences.en: For people who post like it’s their job.
sentences.zh: 对于那些把发帖视为自己工作的人来说。

blocks.html_en: For teams shipping content at industrial scale.

sentences.en: For teams shipping content at industrial scale.
sentences.zh: 适用于以工业规模交付内容的团队。

blocks.html_en: FAQ — THE STUFF YOU'D DM US ANYWAY

sentences.en: FAQ — THE STUFF YOU'D DM US ANYWAY
sentences.zh: 常见问题解答 — 您无论如何都会向我们发送的信息

blocks.html_en: No — that's the whole point. Type what you want in plain words (“make this a punchy TikTok”, “add captions”, “cut the boring parts”) and the AI agent plans and applies the edits. Everything stays on a normal timeline, so you can tweak by hand whenever you want.

sentences.en: Type what you want in plain words (“make this a punchy TikTok”, “add captions”, “cut the boring parts”) and the AI agent plans and applies the edits.
sentences.zh: 用简单的文字输入你想要的内容（“让它成为一个有力的 TikTok”、“添加字幕”、“删除无聊的部分”），人工智能代理会计划并应用编辑。

sentences.en: Everything stays on a normal timeline, so you can tweak by hand whenever you want.
sentences.zh: 一切都保持在正常的时间线上，因此您可以随时手动调整。

blocks.html_en: Yes. 3 projects, the AI console, auto-captions, effects, and 720p exports — free forever, with a small watermark. Upgrade when you want 4K, no watermark, and the pro effects.

sentences.en: 3 projects, the AI console, auto-captions, effects, and 720p exports — free forever, with a small watermark.
sentences.zh: 3 个项目、AI 控制台、自动字幕、效果和 720p 导出 - 永久免费，带有小水印。

sentences.en: Upgrade when you want 4K, no watermark, and the pro effects.
sentences.zh: 当您需要 4K、无水印和专业效果时请升级。

blocks.html_en: Your uploads live in your account and are only used to render your videos. The clip analysis (transcripts, silence detection) runs to power your edits — we don't train on your footage or share it.

sentences.en: Your uploads live in your account and are only used to render your videos.
sentences.zh: 您上传的内容保存在您的帐户中，仅用于渲染您的视频。

sentences.en: The clip analysis (transcripts, silence detection) runs to power your edits — we don't train on your footage or share it.
sentences.zh: 剪辑分析（脚本、静音检测）会为您的编辑提供支持——我们不会对您的素材进行训练或分享。

blocks.html_en: Those are tools you operate. Vidmoat is agent-first: an editor that operates itself — an AI with hands on the actual timeline. It cuts, captions, grades and re-formats across platforms from one prompt, everything stays fully editable, and it's the only editor external AI agents can drive too.

sentences.en: Vidmoat is agent-first: an editor that operates itself — an AI with hands on the actual timeline.
sentences.zh: Vidmoat 是代理优先：一个可以自行操作的编辑器——一个掌握实际时间线的人工智能。

sentences.en: It cuts, captions, grades and re-formats across platforms from one prompt, everything stays fully editable, and it's the only editor external AI agents can drive too.
sentences.zh: 它可以通过一个提示跨平台进行剪切、字幕、分级和重新格式化，所有内容都保持完全可编辑，并且它是外部人工智能代理也可以驱动的唯一编辑器。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Vidmoat ships an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server: create an API key in your dashboard, add it to Claude Code or Cursor in one command, and your agent can import media, edit the timeline with 65+ commands, preview frames as images, and render MP4s — without ever opening the app.

sentences.en: Vidmoat ships an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server: create an API key in your dashboard, add it to Claude Code or Cursor in one command, and your agent can import media, edit the timeline with 65+ commands, preview frames as images, and render MP4s — without ever opening the app.
sentences.zh: Vidmoat 附带 MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器：在仪表板中创建 API 密钥，通过一个命令将其添加到 Claude Code 或 Cursor，您的代理可以导入媒体、使用 65 多个命令编辑时间线、以图像形式预览帧以及渲染 MP4，而无需打开应用程序。

blocks.html_en: Anytime, in one click from your account page (Stripe handles it — no email-us-to-cancel games). Your plan stays active until the end of the period you paid for.

sentences.en: Anytime, in one click from your account page (Stripe handles it — no email-us-to-cancel games).
sentences.zh: 任何时候，只需在您的帐户页面上单击一下（Stripe 即可处理 — 无需向我们发送电子邮件取消游戏）。

sentences.en: Your plan stays active until the end of the period you paid for.
sentences.zh: 您的计划将一直有效，直到您付费的期限结束。

blocks.html_en: Auto-captions with word-sync, silence cutting, multi-step edit plans from one prompt, background removal, green screen, a cleanup brush, 33+ effects, smart splits with varied transitions — and the list grows weekly.

sentences.en: Auto-captions with word-sync, silence cutting, multi-step edit plans from one prompt, background removal, green screen, a cleanup brush, 33+ effects, smart splits with varied transitions — and the list grows weekly.
sentences.zh: 带文字同步的自动字幕、静音剪切、一次提示的多步编辑计划、背景删除、绿屏、清理画笔、超过 33 种效果、具有各种过渡的智能分割 - 而且该列表每周都在增长。

content_html_zh:
VIDMOAT

REC 00:00:00:00/代理优先视频编辑器

不要编辑。委托。

Vidmoat 是专为特工打造的视频编辑器。 告诉内置的你想要什么——或者插入 Claude、Cursor 或你自己的——它就会剪切、字幕、评分并发送完成的视频。 你把功劳拿走了。

没有信用卡。 无水印。 没有“渲染...” 存在主义的恐惧。

✦ 减少47次沉默

✦ 字幕：开

✦ 配套的幕后花絮

▶

“好吧，今天我们要做最脆的——”

00:0000:3001:0001:3002:0002:3003:00

B-roll: 嘶嘶作响.mp4

B卷：电镀.mp4

字幕.srt — 自动

代理优先✦MCP 服务器✦自动剪切✦AI 字幕✦文本编辑✦一键式短片✦

代理优先✦MCP 服务器✦自动剪切✦AI 字幕✦文本编辑✦一键式短片✦

MCP工具

插入 Claude 或 Cursor

效果和滤镜

1

提示编辑

代理完成剩下的工作

TIKTOK ✦ 卷轴 ✦ YouTube ✦ 短裤

专为您实际发布的地方而设计

编辑一次。 到处发帖。

一次编辑会针对每个平台进行重新设计、重新计时和重新挂钩。 单击一种格式 - 或者只是观看它循环。

TIKTOKthe CRISPIEST9:16 · 钩子重写

卷轴 9:16 · 自动重构

YOUTUBE16:9 · 全剪辑 · 11:07

短裤×12·含挂钩

一项编辑。 十六个帖子已发出。 您的上传计划从未预见到它的到来。

[F1] — 头条新闻

自动剪切功能会观看您全部 3 小时的镜头，因此您无需这样做。

它会在你的咖啡冲泡之前找到好的镜头，消除死气沉沉的气氛，缝合故事。 每个剪辑都保持可编辑，因为我们知道您无论如何都会对其进行调整。

在编辑器中查看 →

RAW — 03:12:443h 的混乱

✂ 自动剪切运行（14 秒）

CUT — 00:11:0711 分钟的香肠

[新] — MOAT AI 代理

输入您想要的内容。看着它自行编辑。

从未打开过视频编辑器？ 没关系。 告诉代理“让它成为一个有力的 TikTok”，它会读取你的镜头，编写字幕，消除死气沉沉的气氛，并对颜色进行分级 - 一步一步，大声大声，直到完成。

✦理解剪辑中所说的内容（单词级别）

✦计划多步骤编辑和自我纠正

✦永远不要碰你没有要求的东西

免费尝试提示 →

MOAT AI — 代理控制台live

让它成为一个有力的抖音

[新] — 带上你自己的代理人

您的编辑器现在是 MCP 服务器。

任何人工智能代理都可以端到端驱动的第一个视频编辑器。 通过模型上下文协议连接 Claude Code、Cursor 或您自己的代理 — 它们导入素材、编辑时间线、查看它们制作的帧并渲染完成的 MP4。 没有浏览器。 没有点击。

✦65+ 时间线命令 - 字幕、关键帧、效果，所有这些

✦代理看到他们的工作：帧预览以图像形式返回

✦相同的计划，相同的项目 - 只需一个 API 密钥即可

获取您的 MCP 密钥 →

克劳德 — 连接到 vidmoat mcp

$ claude mcp add --transport http vidmoat api.vidmoat.com/api/mcp

>“将我的播客切成 3 段带有卡拉 OK 字幕的短片，然后进行渲染”

与所有讲 MCP 的代理合作

...以及 MCP 客户端的任何其他内容。 一键一指令连接 →

完整套件

里面的一切。

代理人下面有一个完整的专业编辑——打开一个章节。

01Cut & polish

✦自动切换静音

✦节拍同步标记和网格剪切

✦速度斜坡、倒车和定格

✦过渡、蒙版和混合模式

✦颜色等级、LUT 和调整图层

✦一键视频稳定

02Captions, text & audio

✦单词级自动字幕

✦卡拉 OK 和社交字幕样式

✦从记录中删除填充词

✦语音时自动闪避音乐

✦音频均衡器、恢复和静音修剪

✦AI贴纸生成器和HTML标题

03The agent & automation

✦Moat AI 控制台 — 按提示编辑

✦MCP服务器：Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor

✦从 Telegram 和 WhatsApp 聊天编辑

✦脚本编写——构建您自己的编辑宏

✦使用您自己的密钥的 REST API

04Ship everywhere

✦自动重构 9:16 · 1:1 · 16:9

✦平台预设：TikTok、Reels、Shorts、YouTube

✦4K 导出，mp4 / webm / gif

✦分发工作区 — 一次编辑，每种格式

✦桌面应用程序：10 GB 文件，零上传

或者直接跳到工具

新鲜出炉。每周发货。

无插件/无导出队列

删除背景

一键点击。 没有绿屏。 背景只是…… 树叶。

水印

清洁刷

涂掉任何你后悔拍摄的东西。 徽标、陌生人、前任。

KEYED ✦

绿屏

具有溢出清理功能的色度键。 选择颜色，消失。

真实的字幕

卡拉 OK 字幕

每个字在说出时都会亮起。 自动同步到您的音频。

整个套房，没有任何痛苦。

06 工具 / 00 需要教程

[F1]CUT

自动剪切

找到好的镜头，消除失败的镜头。 你的粗剪，已经剪好了。

[F2]TEXT

文本编辑

删除文字记录中的一句话，它就会从视频中消失。 通过退格键进行编辑。

[F3]CC

人工智能字幕

字词完美、节奏明快、风格符合您的品牌。 不是法庭笔录。

[F4]SFX

沉默杀手

嗯，啊，死气沉沉——被发现并删除。 无情地。

[F5]CLIP

一键短裤

输入一段长视频，输出十二段垂直的短视频。 包括挂钩。

[F6]ROLL

花絮大脑

它会扫描您的库并以正确的节拍发出正确的镜头。 你小睡一下。

专为您实际创造的方式而设计

三位创作者。 三条护城河。

同一个代理，三个完全不同的工作流程。 你的就在这儿的某个地方。

🎙️播客

周二晚上记录。 周三早上：完整剧集已在 YouTube 上发布，十二个 Shorts 剪辑，每一个都配有卡拉 OK 字幕。 她已经好几个月没有公开时间表了。

3 小时录制13 个帖子

🍳厨师

用一部手机拍摄整个厨师的过程，转储镜头，输入“快速食谱编辑，保持翻转”。 特工削减了准备工作，保留了火源，在调味料的咆哮中加上了标题。

40 分钟片段 60 秒精彩片段

🏋️教练

在他的下一次会议进入之前，他会在客户的转变中对自己进行绿屏，刷掉健身房的标志，将经过精心设计的细分发送到四个平台。

1 take4 平台

HOW IT WORKS — 3 STEPS, 0 BRAIN CELLS

01

转储你的镜头

把所有东西都拖进去。 好的镜头、错误的镜头、你忘记停止录制的 40 分钟。

02

说说氛围

“快节奏的烹饪视频，有力的字幕，保留锅着火的部分。” 完毕。

03

运送香肠

调整您想要的内容，以各种格式导出，然后回到您真正喜欢的部分：拍摄。

比一个编辑便宜。比三个编辑更快。

常见问题解答 — 您无论如何都会向我们发送的信息

公平的问题。

Do I need to know how to edit video?+

不——这就是重点。 用简单的文字输入你想要的内容（“让它成为一个有力的 TikTok”、“添加字幕”、“删除无聊的部分”），人工智能代理会计划并应用编辑。 一切都保持在正常的时间线上，因此您可以随时手动调整。

Is the free plan actually usable?+

是的。 3 个项目、AI 控制台、自动字幕、效果和 720p 导出 - 永久免费，带有小水印。 当您需要 4K、无水印和专业效果时请升级。

Where does my footage go? Is it private?+

您上传的内容保存在您的帐户中，仅用于渲染您的视频。 剪辑分析（脚本、静音检测）会为您的编辑提供支持——我们不会对您的素材进行训练或分享。

What makes this different from CapCut or Premiere?+

这些是您操作的工具。 Vidmoat 是代理优先：一个可以自行操作的编辑器——一个掌握实际时间线的人工智能。 它可以通过一个提示跨平台进行剪切、字幕、分级和重新格式化，所有内容都保持完全可编辑，并且它是外部人工智能代理也可以驱动的唯一编辑器。

Can I connect my own AI — Claude, Cursor, custom agents?+

是的。 Vidmoat 附带 MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器：在仪表板中创建 API 密钥，通过一个命令将其添加到 Claude Code 或 Cursor，您的代理可以导入媒体、使用 65 多个命令编辑时间线、以图像形式预览帧以及渲染 MP4，而无需打开应用程序。

Can I cancel anytime?+

任何时候，只需在您的帐户页面上单击一下（Stripe 即可处理 — 无需向我们发送电子邮件取消游戏）。 您的计划将一直有效，直到您付费的期限结束。

What can the AI actually do today?+

带文字同步的自动字幕、静音剪切、一次提示的多步编辑计划、背景删除、绿屏、清理画笔、超过 33 种效果、具有各种过渡的智能分割 - 而且该列表每周都在增长。
